## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request targets `dev`.
- [ ] The change is documentation-only and contains no unrelated work.
- [ ] I reviewed the rendered Markdown where practical.
- [ ] Examples and instructions are complete enough for the intended audience.
- [ ] The documentation does not claim unimplemented behavior without clearly labeling it as planned.
- [ ] I did not commit generated files such as `roblox.yml`, `sourcemap.json`, `globalTypes.d.luau`, or `build/`.
- [ ] This pull request contains no publicly disclosed vulnerability details.
